Package org.xmlunit.assertj3.error

package org.xmlunit.assertj3.error
Contains internal classes of XMLUnit's AssertJ 3.x support that are only public as an implementation detail.
Since:
XMLUnit 2.8.1
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.xmlunit.assertj3
    AssertJ 3.x assertions on top of XMLUnit's core.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    ElementsShouldSatisfy
    Copied subset of ElementsShouldSatisfy as AssertJ has moved the nested UnsatisfiedRequirement class to a top level class, breaking backwards compatibility.
    ElementsShouldSatisfy.UnsatisfiedRequirement
    Holds the element not satisfing a requirement and the error message.
    ShouldAnyNodeHaveXPath
     
    ShouldBeConvertible
     
    ShouldBeInvalid
     
    ShouldBeNotSimilar
     
    ShouldBeValid
     
    ShouldHaveAttribute
